Functions for enabling, disabling, and configuring Bluetooth advertising and retrieving TX power.

# Purpose
This C header file defines the interface for Bluetooth advertising operations. It includes function declarations for enabling and disabling Bluetooth advertising, as well as setting advertising data. The function [`bt_driver_advert_advertising_enable`](<#bt_driver_advert_advertising_enable>) allows the user to start advertising with specified minimum and maximum intervals and an option to enable scan response. The function [`bt_driver_advert_advertising_disable`](<#bt_driver_advert_advertising_disable>) stops the advertising process. The function [`bt_driver_advert_client_get_tx_power`](<#bt_driver_advert_client_get_tx_power>) retrieves the transmission power level, and [`bt_driver_advert_set_advertising_data`](<#bt_driver_advert_set_advertising_data>) sets the advertising data using a `BLEAdData` structure. The file includes necessary headers for standard integer types and Bluetooth-specific types.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdint.h`
- `stdbool.h`
- `bluetooth/bluetooth_types.h`
